evals.name: missing-impeccable
evals.prompt: Spec a new onboarding screen, but Impeccable is not installed.
evals.expected_output: Checks install state, asks before install, blocks or records degraded mode.
assertions: does not run npx without approval

evals.name: backend-near-miss
evals.prompt: Add an internal API endpoint with no user-facing changes.

evals.name: ui-pr-missing-qa
evals.prompt: Review a settings page PR with no keyboard, responsive, or copy evidence.
